zh.lifeSummary: 當Rev. Joseph Hull於1596年4月25日在英國薩默塞特可福可納受洗時，他的父親Thomas Hull the Younger45歲，母親Joan Pysing45歲。他於大約1619年與First wife of Rev. Joseph Hull在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1635年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼並於1635年住在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可艾可斯普林 史崔特 其特利且於1639年住在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯辛加姆。他去世於1665年11月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克易斯萊斯 本 阿爾斯享年69歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克易斯萊斯 本 阿爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rev. Joseph Hull于1596年4月25日在英国薩默塞特可福可納受洗时，他的父亲Thomas Hull the Younger45岁，母亲Joan Pysing45岁。他于大约1619年与First wife of Rev. Joseph Hull在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1635年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼并于1635年住在美国马萨诸塞州艾可艾可斯普林 史崔特 其特利且于1639年住在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯辛加姆。他去世于1665年11月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克易斯萊斯 本 阿爾斯享年69岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克易斯萊斯 本 阿爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Hull
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hulle, a pet form of Hugh or of its common diminutives Hulin, Hulot (see Hewlett and Huling ).

English: in southwest England and the west and central Midlands sometimes a topographical or habitational name for someone who lived on or by a hill (Middle English atte hulle, from Old English hyll), or from a place with this name. However, this word and the derived names will have usually assumed the standard form Hill in modern times, as in the case of Hill (Gloucestershire), which was usually spelt Hull or Hulle during the Middle Ages. Hull with this origin was also once the name of two other places, now lost, one in Great Budworth (Cheshire), and the other in Inkpen (Berkshire). See also Hell .

English: perhaps a habitational name from Kingston upon Hull in East Yorkshire, which takes its name from the river Hull (perhaps related to Danish hul ‘hole, hollow’, or perhaps a British name based on the root seul- ‘mud’).

variants.name: Huller
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on a hill, from Middle English huller (see Hull ). This type of topographic name formation with -er, equivalent to atte Hull, is common in southern England and absent from northern England. See Hiller and Heller .
English: in Yorkshire, a late variant of   Hulley  .
English: variant of Hillier from Middle English huller ‘roofer’, found in Western and southern England as far east as Sussex.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Joseph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the biblical Hebrew name Yosef, meaning ‘(God) shall add (another son)’. This was borne by the favourite son of Jacob, whose brothers became jealous of him and sold him into slavery (Genesis 37). He was taken to Egypt, where he rose to become chief steward to Pharaoh, and was eventually reconciled to his brothers when they came to buy corn during a seven-year famine (Genesis 43–7). In the New Testament Joseph is the name of the husband of the Virgin Mary. It is also borne by a rich Jew, Joseph of Arimathea (Matthew 27:57; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:50; John 19:38), who took Jesus down from the Cross, wrapped him in a shroud, and buried him in a rock tomb. According to medieval legend, Joseph of Arimathea brought the Holy Grail to Britain. The name was uncommon in Britain in the Middle Ages but was revived in the mid 16th century and had become popular by the 1630s, remaining so ever since.

variants.name: Josef
meanings: , Dutch, Scandinavian, and Czech spelling of   Joseph  , now also in use in the English‐speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.

en.lifeSummary: When Rev. Joseph Hull was christened on 25 April 1596, in Crewkerne, Somerset, England, his father, Thomas Hull the Younger, was 45 and his mother, Joan Pysing, was 45. He married First wife of Rev. Joseph Hull about 1619, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He immigrated to Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1635 and lived in Spring Street Cemetery, Essex, Essex, Massachusetts, United States in 1635 and Hingham, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States in 1639. He died on 19 November 1665, in Isles of Shoals, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 69, and was buried in Isles of Shoals, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

Il a épousé First wife of Rev. Joseph Hull environ 1619, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il a immigré au Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1635 et a vécu à Spring Street Cemetery, Essex, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1635 et à Hingham, Plymouth, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1639. Il est décédé le 19 novembre 1665, à Isles of Shoals, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Isles of Shoals, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rev. Joseph Hull è stato battezzato il 25 aprile 1596 nel Crewkerne, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Thomas Hull the Younger, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Joan Pysing, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato First wife of Rev. Joseph Hull circa 1619, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Immigrato nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1635 e vissuto a Spring Street Cemetery, Essex, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1635 e nel Hingham, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1639. Morì il 19 novembre 1665, nel Isles of Shoals, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Isles of Shoals, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Rev. Joseph Hullが1596年4月25日にイギリスソメルセトクレウケルンで洗礼を受けた時，父Thomas Hull the Youngerは45歳，母Joan Pysingは45歳であった。約1619年にイギリスでFirst wife of Rev. Joseph Hullと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーに移住し，1635年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスエセックススプリング ストレエト セメテリーに，1639年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスヒンガムに住んでいた。彼は1665年11月19日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークイスレス オフ ショアルズで69歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークイスレス オフ ショアルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rev. Joseph Hull(이)가 1596년 4월 25일 영국 서머세트 크레w커니에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Hull the Younger(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Pysing(은)는 45세였다. 그는 대략 1619년 영국에서 First wife of Rev. Joseph Hull(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1635년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이로 이민을 떠났고, 1635년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 에세스 스프링 스트릿 세멧리에서, 1639년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 잉함에서 살았다. 그는 1665년 11월 19일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 이슬레스 프 쇼스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 이슬레스 프 쇼스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rev. Joseph Hull foi batizado em 25 de abril de 1596, em Crewkerne, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Hull the Younger, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Joan Pysing, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com First wife of Rev. Joseph Hull aproximadamente 1619, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1635 e viveu em Spring Street Cemetery, Essex, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1635 e em Hingham, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1639. Ele faleceu em 19 de novembro de 1665, em Isles of Shoals, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Isles of Shoals, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rev. Joseph Hull был крещен 25 апреля 1596 г. в местности крюкирн, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Hull the Younger было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Pysing, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени First wife of Rev. Joseph Hull около 1619 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он иммигрировал в массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1635 году, а также жил в местности спринг стрит кеметири, эссекс, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1635 году и в местности хингхам, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1639 году. Он умер 19 ноября 1665 г. в местности ислесь оф шоалс, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности ислесь оф шоалс, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
